title: stenotis peninsularis
intro: Stenotis peninsularis, also known as Peninsular Stenotis, is a flowering plant species native to the Iberian Peninsula in southwestern Europe. It is used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving digestive issues, and it is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures. In herbal preparations, Stenotis peninsularis is typically combined with other plants to enhance its medicinal properties and create remedies for various health conditions.
